title: Samsung's slimmer Galaxy Z Flip 8 brings apps and AI to the cover screen - Engadget
summary: As part of its Galaxy Unpacked 2026 event, Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy Z Flip 8 , one of three new foldable phones along with the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Fold 8 Ultra .
